title: Block Explosion PVP
description: Block damage from End Crystal, TNT Minecart, Bed, Respawn Anchor on Player
body:
# Block Explosion PVP
**Prevent damage from TNT Minecart, End Crystal, Bed, Respawn Anchor to Player**

This plugin effectively set damage from these explosion to 0 on Player only, keeping normal functionality of these blocks/items (destroying blocks, damage on other entities).


You can config damage multiplier for each types (Bed and respawn anchors can not set seperate damage multiplier)

Added an option that only Player who caused End Crystal explosion will receive original damage (great way to punish him)
